perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man (3C Tim哥) wearing a newsboy cap and grey cardigan stands on a street corner in front of a red 'miko' store sign, gesturing energetically with his hands while talking. (2) The scene transitions to the interior of a brightly lit mobile phone store where Tim哥 interacts with a male staff member behind a counter. High-quality product boxes for the iPhone 16 Pro Max, Samsung Galaxy A56, and Vivo V40 Lite are presented sequentially with text overlays showing discounted prices. (3) Tim哥 examines a white miko-branded drink carrier and a small brown scent packet. The final shot shows an outdoor street view featuring an archway for 'Danan Market' (大南市場).
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. An enthusiastic male voice (Tim哥) speaks Mandarin with a high-pitched, friendly tone, accompanied by street ambient noise. (2) The music continues as a dialogue starts between two males; the second male (store clerk) has a steady, professional tone. Sounds of boxes being placed on a wooden surface are audible. (3) The conversation shifts to gifts and local food, with the music maintaining a consistent tempo until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c 有意思 tim哥' (channel name), 'miko 米可手機館' (store name). Hook: '老闆你特地帶我遠道' (Boss, you brought me all this way), '桃園' (Taoyuan location tag). (2) Functional Text: 'iPhone 16 pro Max 39890元', '現省 5010', 'Galaxy A56 13490元', '現省 $5190', 'V40 Lite 7490元', '現省 $6500'. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '省很多耶' (Saves a lot!), 'CP值超高!' (High value!), '附近有什麼好吃的?' (Anything good to eat nearby?), '大南市場' (Danan Market).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Product Discount Showcase -> Gift Promotion -> Outro/Local Tip

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥), 1 store clerk, 2 background passers-by briefly visible on the street.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a grey newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, a white t-shirt, and a grey and white patterned cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts on a busy urban street with a red miko storefront, then moves into a clean, modern mobile phone shop with wooden counters and shelves of electronics, and ends with a view of a traditional market entrance.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors and bright, even studio-style LED lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Discounted Product Catalog -> Incentive/Gift Reveal -> Engagement/Local Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a promotional endorsement for the opening of a new 'miko' mobile phone retail branch in Taoyuan. By featuring a well-known tech influencer (3C Tim哥), the content builds trust while explicitly listing specific high-value smartphone discounts and free opening gifts to drive physical foot traffic to the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the store name, showing the physical store location, and listing specific promotional prices and opening gifts provided by the brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim哥's signature high-energy greeting style and the use of '3c 有意思' branding overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of text overlays typical of Taiwanese variety shows or social media marketing to emphasize 'savings' and 'CP value', which are key psychological triggers for local consumers.
